args.code: (async()=>{ const row=document.querySelector(".smtDynamicAttr400000603"); const sel=row?.querySelector(".ant-select-selector,.ant-select"); sel?.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mousedown",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); sel?.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); let opts=[...document.querySelectorAll(".ant-select-dropdown:not(.ant-select-dropdown-hidden) .ant-select-item-option")].filter(e=>e.offsetParent!==null); let opt=opts.find(e=>e.innerText.trim()==="天然未处理(None)")||opts.find(e=>e.innerText.includes("天然未处理(None)")); if(!opt){ const input=row?.querySelector("input"); if(input){ input.value="天然未处理"; input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,800)); opts=[...document.querySelectorAll(".ant-select-dropdown:not(.ant-select-dropdown-hidden) .ant-select-item-option")].filter(e=>e.offsetParent!==null); opt=opts.find(e=>e.innerText.includes("天然未处理(None)")); }} if(!opt) return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:"None option not found",opts:opts.map(e=>e.innerText.trim()).slice(0,50)}); opt.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mousedown",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); opt.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mouseup",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); opt.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1000)); const p=(await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__()).preflight; const high=(p.requiredAttributes.fields||[]).find(x=>x.id==="high_concerned_chemical"); return JSON.stringify({ok:high&&high.ok,rowText:(row?.innerText||"").slice(0,300),high,missing:p.requiredAttributes.missing,unsafe:p.unsafeRequiredAttributeDisplays,blockers:p.risks});})()
